deterministic.engagement_rationale: 10 signals in the last 14 days from 7 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement is high with 10 signals from 7 contacts over the past 14 days, but sentiment is decidedly negative — the dominant theme is active competitive evaluation across multiple stakeholders. Avery Johnson formally requested a vendor capabilities review on Apr 28 ('Data migration'), Dana White on Apr 30 ('Data migration') cited a competitor claiming 3x faster data sync, Riley Wilson on Apr 30 ('Data migration') questioned native Salesforce integration support at Orca Cloud's scale, Blake Brown on May 3 ('Dashboard access') raised Vendor X's data residency approach, and Avery Garcia on May 3 ('User provisioning') disclosed a competitor offering a 90-day POC and requested an equivalent trial environment. Product usage is flat and narrow: only Morgan Jones is active in the product with low-volume events (integration_connected, export_started, settings_updated, file_uploaded between May 4–8), and the Apr 25 'Api rate limits' signal acknowledged slow internal responsiveness, compounding service-confidence concerns. The breadth of competitive inquiries from multiple contacts — spanning data migration, provisioning, dashboard access, and integration — signals a coordinated vendor evaluation that puts this account at serious churn risk.
